test_cases.title: Settings sidebar shows Plugins tab
test_cases.description: Verify Plugins tab appears in Settings sidebar between Agents and System tabs
steps: Open Settings page
Check sidebar contains 'Plugins' tab entry
Verify tab has correct icon (puzzle piece SVG)
Verify tab has correct i18n label

test_cases.title: Clicking Plugins tab shows PluginsPane content
test_cases.description: Verify clicking Plugins tab renders the PluginsPane component
steps: Click Plugins tab in Settings sidebar
Verify activeTab updates to 'plugins'
Verify PluginsPane component is rendered in content area
Verify other panes are hidden (v-show)

test_cases.title: PluginsPane is exported from settings/index.ts
test_cases.description: Verify PluginsPane can be imported from settings barrel file
steps: Import { PluginsPane } from settings/index.ts
Verify PluginsPane is a valid Vue component

test_cases.title: Worker executes registered tool handler and returns result
test_cases.description: Send plugin.tool.execute RPC request to Worker, verify handler is called and result returned via parentPort
steps: Register a mock ToolExecuteHandler with registerToolHandler('test-plugin:my-tool', handler)
Send HostToWorkerMessage { type: 'rpc', request: { method: 'plugin.tool.execute', params: { pluginId, toolName, arguments } } }
Verify handler was called with correct params
Verify parentPort.postMessage called with { type: 'rpc', response: { result } }

test_cases.title: Worker returns METHOD_NOT_FOUND when tool handler missing
test_cases.description: Send plugin.tool.execute for unregistered tool, verify error response
steps: Do NOT register any handler
Send HostToWorkerMessage { type: 'rpc', request: { method: 'plugin.tool.execute', params: { pluginId: 'x', toolName: 'missing' } } }
Verify parentPort.postMessage called with error response (code: METHOD_NOT_FOUND)

test_cases.title: Worker returns INTERNAL_ERROR when handler throws
test_cases.description: Register a handler that throws, verify error response
steps: Register handler that throws new Error('boom')
Send plugin.tool.execute RPC request
Verify parentPort.postMessage called with error response (code: INTERNAL_ERROR, message contains 'boom')

test_cases.title: Worker returns METHOD_NOT_FOUND for unknown RPC method
test_cases.description: Send RPC request with unknown method, verify error response
steps: Send HostToWorkerMessage { type: 'rpc', request: { method: 'unknown.method' } }
Verify parentPort.postMessage called with error response (code: METHOD_NOT_FOUND)

test_cases.title: prepare-pi-resources.sh handles Windows zip flat structure
test_cases.description: Verify script renames pi.exe to BINARY_NAME when no pi/ directory exists
steps: Create temp dir with pi.exe (no pi/ subdirectory)
Run unzip branch of prepare-pi-resources.sh
Verify pi.exe is renamed to pi-windows-x64.exe
Verify chmod +x succeeds on renamed binary

test_cases.title: prepare-pi-resources.sh tar.gz branch unchanged
test_cases.description: Verify macOS/Linux tar.gz extraction still works correctly
steps: Run prepare-pi-resources.sh on macOS
Verify tar.gz branch executes (pi/ directory exists)
Verify binary is renamed correctly

test_cases.title: extension-service test path matching works with backslashes
test_cases.description: Verify normalizePath() correctly handles Windows-style backslash paths in test mocks
steps: Run extension-service.test.ts
Verify all 20 tests pass with normalized path matching
Verify p.replace(/\\/g, '/') converts backslash paths to forward slash

test_cases.title: Full test suite passes after all changes
test_cases.description: Run complete test suite to verify no regressions
steps: Run npm run lint
Run cd src-electron && npx vitest run
Run cd src-electron && npx vue-tsc --noEmit
Verify all commands exit with code 0
